title: tenancy — cache keys
description: Cache keys this module owns. Every key is namespaced by the tenancy hook (`CachePrefixTenantHook` prepends `tenant:{tenant_id}:` per request). Keys documented WITHOUT the tenant prefix — that prefix is applied at read/write time.

keys.description: Denormalised Branding payload for the tenant's primary profile. Read on every request that renders themed chrome.
Effective features array for the tenant (BusinessType.default_config.features + feature-flag overrides). Read on every /auth/me and every access-control check.
The tenant's `provisioning` JSONB (timezone, locale, currency). Read at boot to seed the request-scoped Locale + Region context.
Resolves a host header to the (application_id, tenant_id) tuple. Short TTL because DNS + custom-domain edits need to reflect quickly.
keys.note: Un-prefixed key — this cache is consulted BEFORE the tenant is known.

keys.description: Resolves a host header (central_host or platform_admin_host) to the Application row. Consulted on every request before tenant resolution.
keys.note: Un-prefixed key — application resolution runs before tenant scope.

keys.description: The full BusinessType catalogue (from config). Rarely changes.
keys.note: Un-prefixed key — application-wide catalogue, not tenant-scoped.

keys.description: Per-identity workspace list projection. Powers the workspace picker + shell workspace switcher.
